site.name: Zeplish
site.tagline: Custom AI-powered business software for SMEs. We build software around the way your business actually works.

seo.title: Zeplish — Custom AI Business Software for SMEs
seo.description: Zeplish builds custom AI-powered software for small and medium businesses. CRMs, dashboards, document tracking, billing, reminders and automation — built around your exact workflow.
seo.ogDescription: Tired of spreadsheets, WhatsApp follow-ups and manual tracking? Zeplish builds custom AI-powered business software tailored to how your SME actually works.
seo.twitterDescription: Custom AI software for SMEs. CRMs, dashboards, automation and more — built around your exact workflow. Book a free consultation.

hero.headline: We build custom AI software for businesses that still run on spreadsheets
hero.subheadline: From document expiry tracking to lead management, staff workflows, billing, reminders, dashboards and AI automation — we build software around the way your business actually works.
hero.trustLine: Built for SMEs, service businesses, schools, clinics, agencies and growing teams.

problem.title: Most SMEs don't need more apps.

featuredCaseStudy.name: DocTrackr
featuredCaseStudy.subtitle: Document expiry tracking system for a US-based daycare business.
featuredCaseStudy.problem: Documents tracked manually, expiry dates missed, staff compliance hard to monitor, follow-ups time-consuming.
featuredCaseStudy.solution: Custom dashboard, document database, expiry date tracking, automated SMS/email reminders, staff-wise document status, admin-friendly interface.

caseStudies.title: Software ideas we can build for businesses like yours
caseStudies.note: These are examples of the type of custom systems Zeplish can build. Every business workflow is different — we design the software around your exact process.

items.name: LeadFlow CRM
items.problem: Leads from calls, WhatsApp, ads scattered
items.solution: CRM with lead status, follow-up reminders, property matching, team assignment
items.result: Faster follow-ups and better lead visibility

items.name: ClinicOps
items.problem: Appointments, patient follow-ups, reports handled manually
items.solution: Appointment dashboard, patient records, reminders, prescription upload
items.result: Reduced missed appointments, smoother clinic operations

items.name: SchoolTrack
items.problem: Fee records, student enquiries, batch management in registers and Excel
items.solution: Student CRM, fee tracking, attendance, batch management, parent reminders

items.name: RentWise
items.problem: Multiple properties, tenants, rent dates, maintenance hard to manage
items.solution: Property dashboard, tenant records, rent reminders, maintenance ticketing
items.result: Better rent collection tracking, faster issue resolution

items.name: BillSnap AI
items.problem: Bills and purchases manually typed into spreadsheets
items.solution: AI bill scanning, data extraction, vendor records, monthly reports
items.result: Reduced manual data entry, faster reporting

items.name: ServiceDesk
items.problem: Customer complaints and technician assignments on WhatsApp
items.solution: Ticket system, technician dashboard, status updates, customer notifications
items.result: Better service tracking, fewer missed complaints

items.name: TeamPulse
items.problem: Tasks, client work, deadlines scattered across chats
items.solution: Project dashboard, task assignment, deadline alerts, client-wise progress
items.result: Better team accountability, clearer project visibility

items.name: StockTrack
items.problem: Inventory, orders, production updates not in one place
items.solution: Inventory dashboard, order tracking, low-stock alerts, production status
items.result: Better stock planning, fewer operational delays

process.title: How we build your custom software

steps.title: Discovery Call
steps.desc: We understand your business process, pain points and current tools.

steps.title: Workflow Mapping
steps.desc: We convert your manual process into a clear software flow.

steps.title: Prototype
steps.desc: We show you screens and user journey before full development.

steps.title: Development
steps.desc: We build the application with dashboards, database, automations and AI features.

steps.title: Launch & Support
steps.desc: We deploy, test, train your team and improve based on feedback.

aiFeatures.title: Practical AI features for real businesses
aiFeatures.note: We don't add AI for hype. We add AI where it saves time, reduces errors or improves decisions.

whyUs.title: Why businesses choose Zeplish
points: Simple enough for your team to actually use

items.quote: Zeplish helped us replace manual tracking with a simple software system.
items.author: Operations Manager

items.quote: The dashboard gave us visibility we never had before.
items.author: Founder

items.quote: Our follow-ups became easier and more organized.
items.author: Director

cta.title: Have a business process you want to automate?
cta.text: If your business is still depending on Excel, WhatsApp, manual reminders or disconnected tools, Zeplish can help you build a custom system that saves time and improves control.
cta.subtext: Tell us your business problem. We'll suggest what software can be built.

contact.title: Let's talk about your business.
contact.text: Fill out the form and we'll reach out to schedule a free discovery call. No hard sell, just a practical discussion about your workflows.
